caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated across from each other at a small round table equipped with a laptop and some documents. The interviewer, on the left, is actively engaging with his guest, using hand gestures to emphasize points as he speaks. The guest, on the right, listens attentively, occasionally nodding in response. The background shows a spacious, well-lit hallway with other attendees walking by, indicating a busy conference environment. The setting suggests a formal yet dynamic discussion, likely centered around topics related to MongoDB and its applications in the tech industry.
